name: zamanyar
description: Smart browser extension for localized calendars, dates, times, numbers, fonts and per-site controls

scripts.check: node --check src/background/background.js && node --check src/content/jalaali.js && node --check src/content/content.js && node --check src/options/options.js && node --check src/popup/popup.js && node --check src/shared/i18n.js && node --check src/shared/system-fonts.js && node --check docs/demo.js
